Completed At: 2026-06-14T07:28:36Z

The following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.
1: package com.smssentry.deepcheck.model
2: 
3: import android.util.Log
4: import com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.Backend
5: import com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.Content
6: import com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.Contents
7: import com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.Conversation
8: import com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.ConversationConfig
9: import com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.Engine
10: import com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.EngineConfig
11: import com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.Message
12: import com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.SamplerConfig
13: import com.smssentry.deepcheck.DeepCheckConfig
14: import kotlinx.coroutines.CompletableDeferred
15: import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
16: import kotlinx.coroutines.sync.Mutex
17: import kotlinx.coroutines.sync.withLock
18: import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
19: import kotlinx.coroutines.withTimeout
20: import java.io.File
21: 
22: /**
23:  * LiteRT-LM engine wrapper modeled after the official Google AI Edge Gallery
24:  * implementation (LlmChatModelHelper.kt).
25:  *
26:  * Key differences from the previous implementation:
27:  * 1. GPU backend with automatic CPU fallback (Gallery pattern)
28:  * 2. cacheDir for faster subsequent loads
29:  * 3. Thread-safe initialization via Mutex (prevents double-init race condition)
30:  * 4. Non-blocking timeout via CompletableDeferred (JNI calls can't be
31:  *    interrupted by coroutine cooperative cancellation)
32:  * 5. System prompt via ConversationConfig.systemInstruction (not Message.user)
33:  */
34: class LiteRtLmEngine(
35:     private val modelPath: String,
36:     private val cacheDir: String? = null
37: ) : LlmInferenceEngine {
38: 
39:     private val TAG = "LiteRtLmEngine"
40: 
41:     private var engine: Engine? = null
42:     private val initMutex = Mutex()
43: 
44:     override suspend fun load() {
45:         // Mutex ensures only one initialization runs at a time.
46:         // If init{} in ModelRepository started a load and the session
47:         // calls load() again, the second caller waits for the first
48:         // to finish, then sees engine != null and returns immediately.
49:         initMutex.withLock {
50:             if (engine != null) return  // Already initialized
51: 
52:             val modelFile = File(modelPath)
53:             if (!modelFile.exists() || modelFile.length() < DeepCheckConfig.MIN_FILE_SIZE_BYTES) {
54:                 throw IllegalStateException("Model file incomplete or missing")
55:             }
56: 
57:             // Try GPU first (matches Gallery behavior), fall back to CPU.
58:             // GPU initialization is dramatically faster on supported devices.
59:             engine = try {
60:                 Log.i(TAG, "Attempting GPU backend initialization...")
61:                 initializeWithBackend(Backend.GPU())
62:             } catch (e: Exception) {
63:                 Log.w(TAG, "GPU backend failed (${e.message}), falling back to CPU")
64:                 try {
65:                     initializeWithBackend(Backend.CPU())
66:                 } catch (cpuError: Exception) {
67:                     Log.e(TAG, "CPU backend also failed", cpuError)
68:                     throw IllegalStateException(
69:                         "Failed to initialize model on both GPU and CPU: ${cpuError.message}",
70:                         cpuError
71:                     )
72:                 }
73:             }
74:             Log.i(TAG, "Engine initialized successfully")
75:         }
76:     }
77: 
78:     /**
79:      * Initialize the engine on a dedicated thread via CompletableDeferred.
80:      *
81:      * Engine.initialize() is a blocking JNI call that cannot be interrupted
82:      * by coroutine cooperative cancellation. By running it on a plain Thread
83:      * and awaiting a CompletableDeferred, withTimeout() can cancel at the
84:      * await() suspension point even if the JNI call hasn't returned yet.
85:      */
86:     private suspend fun initializeWithBackend(backend: Backend): Engine {
87:         val config = EngineConfig(
88:             modelPath = modelPath,
89:             backend = backend,
90:             cacheDir = cacheDir ?: ""
91:         )
92:         val eng = Engine(config)
93: 
94:         // Run the blocking JNI init on a separate thread so that
95:         // coroutine timeout can actually cancel if needed.
96:         val deferred = CompletableDeferred<Unit>()
97:         val initThread = Thread({
98:             try {
99:                 eng.initialize()
100:                 deferred.complete(Unit)
101:             } catch (e: Exception) {
102:                 deferred.completeExceptionally(e)
103:             }
104:         }, "LiteRtLmEngine-init")
105: 
106:         initThread.start()
107: 
108:         try {
109:             // 120-second timeout for engine initialization.
110:             // Galaxy A14 takes ~30s with GPU, up to ~90s on CPU.
111:             withTimeout(120_000L) {
112:                 deferred.await()
113:             }
114:         } catch (e: Exception) {
115:             // If timeout or cancellation, try to close the engine
116:             try { eng.close() } catch (_: Exception) {}
117:             throw e
118:         }
119: 
120:         return eng
121:     }
122: 
123:     override fun createSession(systemPrompt: String): LlmConversationSession {
124:         val eng = engine ?: throw IllegalStateException("Model not loaded — call load() first")
125:         val samplerConfig = SamplerConfig(topK = 40, temperature = 0.7, topP = 0.9)
126:         // System prompt passed via ConversationConfig.systemInstruction
127:         // (not as Message.user), matching the Gallery pattern.
128:         val convConfig = ConversationConfig(
129:             samplerConfig = samplerConfig,
130:             systemInstruction = Contents.of(systemPrompt)
131:         )
132:         val conv = eng.createConversation(convConfig)
133:         return LlmConversationSession(conv)
134:     }
135: 
136:     override suspend fun generate(prompt: String): String = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
137:         val currentEngine = engine ?: throw IllegalStateException("Model not loaded")
138:         val samplerConfig = SamplerConfig(topK = 40, temperature = 0.7, topP = 0.9)
139:         val conversationConfig = ConversationConfig(samplerConfig = samplerConfig)
140:         val conversation = currentEngine.createConversation(conversationConfig)
141: 
142:         try {
143:             val userMessage = Message.user(prompt)
144:             val responseMessage = conversation.sendMessage(userMessage)
145:             extractTextFromMessage(responseMessage)
146:         } finally {
147:             conversation.close()
148:         }
149:     }
150: 
151:     override fun close() {
152:         engine?.close()
153:         engine = null
154:     }
155: 
156:     companion object {
157:         /**
158:          * Safely extract text content from a LiteRT-LM Message response.
159:          */
160:         fun extractTextFromMessage(message: Message): String {
161:             return try {
162:                 val contents = message.contents.contents
163:                 contents.filterIsInstance<Content.Text>()
164:                     .joinToString("") { it.text }
165:             } catch (e: Exception) {
166:                 message.toString()
167:             }
168:         }
169:     }
170: }
171:

51:         initMutex.withLock {
52:             if (engine != null) {
53:                 Diagnostics.d(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "load() skipped — engine already initialized")
54:                 return  // Already initialized
55:             }
56: 
57:             val modelFile = File(modelPath)
58:             if (!modelFile.exists() || modelFile.length() < DeepCheckConfig.MIN_FILE_SIZE_BYTES) {
59:                 Diagnostics.e(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "Model file invalid: exists=${modelFile.exists()}, size=${if (modelFile.exists()) modelFile.length() else 0}")
60:                 throw IllegalStateException("Model file incomplete or missing")
61:             }
62:             Diagnostics.d(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "Model file validated: size=${modelFile.length()} bytes")

95:      * Engine.initialize() is a blocking JNI call that cannot be interrupted
96:      * by coroutine cooperative cancellation. By running it on a plain Thread
97:      * and awaiting a CompletableDeferred, withTimeout() can cancel at the
98:      * await() suspension point even if the JNI call hasn't returned yet.
99:      */
100:     private suspend fun initializeWithBackend(backend: Backend): Engine {
101:         val backendName = if (backend is Backend.GPU) "GPU" else "CPU"

103:         val config = EngineConfig(
104:             modelPath = modelPath,

107:         )

114:             try {
115:                 Diagnostics.d(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "JNI init thread started for $backendName")
116:                 eng.initialize()
117:                 Diagnostics.d(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "JNI init completed for $backendName")
118:                 deferred.complete(Unit)
119:             } catch (e: Exception) {
120:                 Diagnostics.e(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "JNI init failed for $backendName: ${e.message}")
121:                 deferred.completeExceptionally(e)
122:             }
123:         }, "LiteRtLmEngine-init")
124: 
125:         initThread.start()
126:         Diagnostics.d(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "Init thread started, awaiting deferred with 120s timeout")
127: 
128:         try {
129:             // 120-second timeout for engine initialization.
130:             // Galaxy A14 takes ~30s with GPU, up to ~90s on CPU.
131:             withTimeout(120_000L) {
132:                 deferred.await()
133:             }
134:             Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "initializeWithBackend($backendName) succeeded")
135:         } catch (e: Exception) {
136:             Diagnostics.e(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "initializeWithBackend($backendName) failed/timed-out: ${e.message}")
137:             // If timeout or cancellation, try to close the engine
138:             try { eng.close() } catch (_: Exception) {}
139:             throw e

142:         return eng
143:     }

147:         val eng = engine ?: throw IllegalStateException("Model not loaded — call load() first")
148:         val samplerConfig = SamplerConfig(topK = 40, temperature = 0.7, topP = 0.9)

159:         return LlmConversationSession(conv)
160:     }
